tutorial-1-production: Your shape produces Nusians automatically over time. Just watch the number grow.
tutorial-2-upgrades: Head to the Upgrades tab to spend your Nusians on improvements. Each upgrade makes your shape produce faster or grow bigger.
tutorial-3-prestige: Once you've collected enough Nusians, you can Prestige from the Prestige tab. This resets your shape and upgrades, but grants you Prestige Points and a permanent production bonus.
tutorial-4-prestige-upgrades: Spend Prestige Points on permanent Prestige Upgrades. These carry over through every future Prestige. Keep prestiging to earn more!
